title: centaurea yemensis
intro: Centaurea yemensis, also known as Yemen centaury, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow or orange flowers and long, slender leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Centaurea yemensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
